falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 70 would indicate extreme volatility or momentum, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal or breakout.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5500 (resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the pattern's similarity to a bottom, suggesting a bullish trend rather than a hold.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 20% above the 14-day average in the next 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume would indicate strong market participation, falsifying the HOLD by showing decisive price action rather than indecision.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
